condition.description: Defines a condition under which the IAM binding applies, using attributes such as expression, title, and description.

folder.description: Specifies the folder ID where the IAM binding will be applied. Must be a valid folder ID in the Google Cloud hierarchy.

members.description: List of IAM members to be granted the specified role in the folder. Must be in the format 'user:email', 'serviceAccount:email', 'group:email', or 'domain:domain'.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the members, such as roles/editor. Must be a predefined Google Cloud role.
